name: Tampa Bay
author: rslurry
description:
Uses 2023 LODES data. Coverage spans from St. Petersburg/Ruskin in the south, the Gulf in the west, Plant City in the east, and Wesley Chapel/New Port Richey in the north.
Includes demand for TPA and PIE airports; USF Tampa and St. Pete campuses, U Tampa, Stetson Law in St. Pete, and HCC (5 main campuses) universities; the Benchmark International Arena, Raymond James Stadium, Tropicana Field, Busch Gardens, Adventure Island, Florida Aquarium, Lowry Park Zoo, and the Dali Museum.
